title: [InstCombine] Preserve the flag from RHS only if the `and` is bitwise

tests.outside_scope_reason: Summary specifically mentions olt predicate, but this test uses ult (unordered less than) which also passes IsLessThanOrLessEqual check. Additionally uses double precision instead of float.

alive2.log:
----------------------------------------
define i1 @test_and_ult_fmf_propagation_union_double(double %x) {
#0:
  %cmp1 = fcmp nnan ninf ult double %x, 0.000000
  %cmp2 = fcmp nnan nsz ugt double %x, -0.000000
  %cond = and i1 %cmp1, %cmp2
  ret i1 %cond
}
=>
define i1 @test_and_ult_fmf_propagation_union_double(double %x) {
#0:
  %#1 = fabs nnan ninf nsz double %x
  %cond = fcmp nnan ninf nsz ult double %#1, 0.000000
  ret i1 %cond
}
Transformation seems to be correct!

Summary:
  1 correct transformations
  0 incorrect transformations
  0 failed-to-prove transformations
  0 Alive2 errors

tests.outside_scope_reason: Summary focuses on olt/ogt predicates, but this uses ole/oge (ordered less/greater equal) which also satisfy IsLessThanOrLessEqual. Tests mixed FMF flags where each side has different flags.

alive2.log:
----------------------------------------
define i1 @test_and_ole_fmf_mixed_flags_propagation(float %x) {
#0:
  %cmp1 = fcmp nnan ole float %x, 0.000000
  %cmp2 = fcmp ninf oge float %x, -0.000000
  %cond = and i1 %cmp1, %cmp2
  ret i1 %cond
}
=>
define i1 @test_and_ole_fmf_mixed_flags_propagation(float %x) {
#0:
  %#1 = fabs nnan ninf float %x
  %cond = fcmp nnan ninf ole float %#1, 0.000000
  ret i1 %cond
}
Transformation seems to be correct!

Summary:
  1 correct transformations
  0 incorrect transformations
  0 failed-to-prove transformations
  0 Alive2 errors

tests.outside_scope_reason: Summary describes cases where RHS has poison flags, but this tests the inverse scenario where RHS has no FMF flags at all while LHS has multiple flags, verifying logical AND correctly ignores RHS flags entirely.

alive2.log:
----------------------------------------
define i1 @test_logical_and_fmf_rhs_no_flags_lhs_flags(float %x) {
#0:
  %cmp1 = fcmp nnan nsz olt float %x, 0.000000
  %cmp2 = fcmp ogt float %x, -0.000000
  %cond = select i1 %cmp2, i1 %cmp1, i1 0
  ret i1 %cond
}
=>
define i1 @test_logical_and_fmf_rhs_no_flags_lhs_flags(float %x) {
#0:
  %#1 = fabs float %x
  %cond = fcmp olt float %#1, 0.000000
  ret i1 %cond
}
Transformation seems to be correct!

Summary:
  1 correct transformations
  0 incorrect transformations
  0 failed-to-prove transformations
  0 Alive2 errors
